sessionContext.summary: Investigating p99 latency spike on checkout-service. Root cause identified: N+1 query from deployment v2.4.1. Rollback recommended. 12,400 users affected, $18.2K revenue at risk.

userMemories.title: checkout-service: deployment rollback pattern
userMemories.content: When checkout-service latency spikes within 15 min of a deployment, the root cause is almost always the deployment itself. Recommended: rollback first, investigate second.

userMemories.title: inventory-service CPU spikes are batch jobs
userMemories.content: Monday 2-3AM UTC CPU spikes on inventory-service are expected batch processing. NOT an incident. Agent should suppress alerts during this window.
userMemories.source: You disagreed with agent on INV-0819

userMemories.title: payment-gateway: Redis pool monitoring needed
userMemories.content: Redis connections can hit pool max (200) without any alert. Need to add connection pool monitoring alert at warn=150, crit=190.

userMemories.title: api-gateway: cert expiry pattern (90-day cycle)
userMemories.content: When api-gateway shows 5xx spike without recent deployments, check TLS cert validity first. auth-service certs are on 90-day rotation and have failed twice.

userMemories.title: search-service: N+1 query detection shortcut
userMemories.content: When search-service latency spikes, check database query count first. If >500 queries/min, it's likely an N+1 pattern from an ORM change.

userMemories.title: Bookmark: ArgoCD rollback command reference
userMemories.content: argocd app rollback <app-name> --to <revision>. Always verify pods healthy after rollback with: kubectl get pods -n production -l app=<name>

userMemories.title: payment-gateway: DNS resolution flakiness
userMemories.content: payment-gateway DNS failures correlate with Route53 TTL changes. Check ServiceNow for recent DNS config changes first.

approved.title: Billing DB spikes at 2 AM PST on Sundays
approved.content: The billing database always spikes to 90% CPU at 2 AM PST on Sundays due to a scheduled batch job. Ignore it.

approved.title: Redis clusters named cache-prd-*, not redis-prd-*
approved.content: Production Redis clusters are named cache-prd-*, not redis-prd-*. All monitoring queries must use the cache-prd prefix.

approved.title: checkout-service: always page #sre-checkout-crit for P1
approved.content: Any critical alert tied to checkout-service must automatically page the #sre-checkout-crit Slack channel. VP Eng escalation if >30 min.

approved.title: Exclude load-test and sandbox from NRQL queries
approved.content: Whenever querying APM transaction times, always exclude the load-test and sandbox environments using WHERE environment NOT IN ('load-test', 'sandbox').

approved.title: auth-service: restart pods for memory leak, never rollback DB
approved.content: If auth-service starts throwing memory leak errors, the SOP is to restart the pods. Do not rollback the database schema.

approved.title: Synthetic pings from AP-South timeout due to VPN
approved.content: Synthetic ping checks from the AP-South region frequently timeout due to our VPN flakiness, not application downtime. Filter out AP-South for uptime calculations.

pending.title: payment-gateway: Redis connection leak in v3.1.x
pending.content: payment-gateway versions 3.1.x have a connection leak when payment processing times out. Connections are opened but not released.

pending.title: api-gateway: automate cert-manager for TLS rotation
pending.content: auth-service TLS certs expire every 90 days and have caused 2 incidents. cert-manager should be configured for auto-renewal.
